data.title: New TPA Report Finds FDA Costs Soaring, Drug Rejections Rising
data.description: On March 26, 2026, the Taxpayers Protection Alliance (TPA) published a report titled "Blocking Breakthroughs: Delays and Denials at the FDA," shedding light on concerns regarding the FDA's drug approval procedures. The report was unveiled in Washington and discusses various challenges faced by the FDA's approval process. This release coincides with ongoing discussions around the efficiency of the FDA in evaluating and approving new medications and treatments.

data.title: Binance extends Banking Triparty fee waiver promo until June 2026, allowing institutions to trade with off-exchange collateral.
data.description: Binance has decided to prolong its offer of fee exemption for its institutional Banking Triparty service until June 30, 2026. This move allows institutions to continue trading with off-exchange collateral without being charged fees. This extension provides these institutions with more time to take advantage of the service.

data.title: KBRA Assigns Preliminary Ratings to First Investors Auto Owner Trust 2026-1
data.description: In New York, KBRA has assigned preliminary ratings to six classes of notes from First Investors Auto Owner Trust 2026-1, an asset-backed securitization backed by auto loans. This marks the first term ABS securitization in 2026 for Stellantis Financial Services, Inc. operating as First Investors Financial Services. Since being acquired by Stellantis N.V. in 2021, this is the fifth securitization by the Company. FIAOT 2026-1 will issue six classes of notes.

data.title: STARK Opens Luxury Rug Showroom in Charleston, Expanding Its Presence in the Southeast Design Market
data.description: A luxury rugs and carpets leader, STARK, revealed the launch of its latest showroom in Charleston, South Carolina, scheduled to open on May 11, 2026. This move signifies a notable expansion into one of the United States' key markets.

data.title: Liqua-Roof Launches in Pittsburgh, Introducing Reinforcement Beyond Renewal
data.description: In Pittsburgh, homeowners now have the opportunity to utilize a patented roof resurfacing system that boasts a 15-year warranty. This innovative solution comes at a significantly lower cost and with less time and mess involved compared to full roof replacements. The system is known as Stronger Than New and is set to benefit a large number of homeowners in the area.

data.title: Coinbase, Better Bring Crypto-Backed Mortgages To Millions Of Americans
data.description: Shares of Better Home & Finance Holding Company (NASDAQ: BETR) surged on Thursday following the announcement of a significant partnership with Coinbase Global, Inc. (NASDAQ: COIN). The collaboration introduces token-backed mortgages, revolutionizing the process of securing home loans. This pioneering initiative allows individuals to use Bitcoin or USDC as collateral without the necessity of selling their digital assets. Through this partnership, homeownership is made more accessible to the 52 million Americans who own cryptocurrencies. By utilizing their crypto holdings as collateral for conforming mortgages, customers can forego the traditional cash down payment. This partnership aims to provide a more inclusive approach to homeownership, enabling more individuals to enter the housing market using their digital assets.

data.title: EU plans privacy coin ban by July 2027; Binance explores zero-knowledge compliance to align with GDPR on blockchain.
data.description: Binance is exploring the usage of zero-knowledge proofs to comply with the upcoming EU ban on privacy coins in July 2027. The ban aims to address concerns related to privacy and data protection. By utilizing this technology, Binance seeks to ensure adherence to GDPR regulations while maintaining the essential functionalities of blockchain technology. This alternative approach could potentially provide a solution to the regulatory challenges posed by the impending ban.

data.title: Where You Live Still Shapes Access to Child Care, New Report Finds
data.description: Inconsistencies in state funding persist, leaving young children underserved across the nation. A recent study by Child Care Aware® of America highlights the disparity, revealing that access to child care remains highly contingent on geographical location. Released on March 26, 2026, the report titled "An Uneven Start" underscores the stark reality that many families face. The data indicates that state funding for child care varies significantly, with a substantial number of regions still lacking adequate support. This discrepancy underscores the ongoing struggle for families seeking reliable child care options, emphasizing the urgent need for consistent and sufficient funding to ensure the well-being of young children nationwide.

data.title: Coinbase, Better Bring Crypto Backed Mortgages To Millions Of Americans
data.description: Shares of Better Home & Finance Holding Company (NASDAQ: BETR) surged today after announcing a pioneering collaboration with Coinbase Global, Inc. (NASDAQ: COIN) to introduce token-backed mortgages. This groundbreaking initiative allows individuals to secure home loans by using Bitcoin or USDC without the need to sell their assets. The partnership targets the 52 million Americans who possess digital assets, offering them the opportunity to utilize their crypto holdings as collateral for conforming mortgages. Through the tokenized asset pledge, customers can use their crypto assets in place of a traditional cash down payment, democratizing homeownership and providing greater accessibility to housing loans for a larger population.
